promptAppend: Highest-impact bug shapes: (1) anything that leaks an agent-wallet private key out of packages/hl-react/src/signing/ (the keys in localStorage hyperliquid_agent_* must never appear in logs, telemetry, RQ-persisted cache, error messages, postMessage payloads, URL params, or be read on the SSR server); (2) builder-fee config tampering or hardcoded builder addresses in order/transfer flows under apps/terminal/src/lib/trade/ or packages/hl-react/src/hooks; (3) signing on the wrong network (env mismatch between getNetwork() and the storage namespace); (4) XSS sinks that render market metadata, asset names, builder URLs, or LiFi/bridge quote responses as raw HTML or as href without scheme checks. The TradingView charting_library is a vendored third-party bundle — out of scope.
